name: Respondology
description: Respondology — brand and creator comment moderation across Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook.

seo.title: Respondology — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Respondology: Respondology — brand and creator comment moderation across Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook.

when_to_use: Hiding brand-unsafe comments on social media posts automatically
Moderating Instagram and Facebook comments with AI filters
Building brand protection workflows for social media managers
Running real-time social comment filtering for community safety

pros: Purpose-built for brand and creator comment hygiene
Covers Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook in one
cons: Not a developer API product, more SaaS workflow
Pricing targets agencies and large brands
Coverage depends on platform API access
review.verdict: Right tool for brand social teams; don't mistake it for a general content moderation API.
review.best_for: Enterprise brands, creators, and agencies cleaning comments across multiple social networks.
review.not_for: Product teams moderating in-app UGC or needing raw classifier APIs.
